title: valerianella locusta subsp. lusitanica
intro: Valerianella locusta subsp. lusitanica, also known as the Lusitanian corn spurry, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Valerianella locusta subsp. lusitanica include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as an anti-diabetic agent. Valerianella locusta subsp. lusitanica can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or capsule, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
